entries.en-US: ## Fullscreen transitions
entries.zh-Hans: ## 全屏过渡

entries.en-US:
Using `<TransitionSeries>` to animate between multiple scenes or clips.
This will absolutely position the children.
entries.zh-Hans:
使用 `<TransitionSeries>` 在多个场景或片段之间进行动画过渡。
这将绝对定位子元素。

entries.en-US: ## Prerequisites
entries.zh-Hans: ## 前提条件

entries.en-US:
First, the @remotion/transitions package needs to be installed.
If it is not, use the following command:
entries.zh-Hans:
首先，需要安装 @remotion/transitions 包。
如果尚未安装，请使用以下命令：

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/transitions # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: ## Example usage
entries.zh-Hans: ## 使用示例

entries.en-US:
```tsx
import {TransitionSeries, linearTiming} from '@remotion/transitions';
import {fade} from '@remotion/transitions/fade';

<TransitionSeries>
  <TransitionSeries.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <SceneA />
  </TransitionSeries.Sequence>
  <TransitionSeries.Transition presentation={fade()} timing={linearTiming({durationInFrames: 15})} />
  <TransitionSeries.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <SceneB />
  </TransitionSeries.Sequence>
</TransitionSeries>;
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
import {TransitionSeries, linearTiming} from '@remotion/transitions';
import {fade} from '@remotion/transitions/fade';

<TransitionSeries>
  <TransitionSeries.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <SceneA />
  </TransitionSeries.Sequence>
  <TransitionSeries.Transition presentation={fade()} timing={linearTiming({durationInFrames: 15})} />
  <TransitionSeries.Sequence durationInFrames={60}>
    <SceneB />
  </TransitionSeries.Sequence>
</TransitionSeries>;
```

entries.en-US: ## Available Transition Types
entries.zh-Hans: ## 可用的过渡类型

entries.en-US: Import transitions from their respective modules:
entries.zh-Hans: 从各自的模块导入过渡效果：

entries.en-US: ## Slide Transition with Direction
entries.zh-Hans: ## 带方向的滑动过渡

entries.en-US: Specify slide direction for enter/exit animations.
entries.zh-Hans: 为进入/退出动画指定滑动方向。

entries.en-US: Directions: `"from-left"`, `"from-right"`, `"from-top"`, `"from-bottom"`
entries.zh-Hans: 方向：`"from-left"`、`"from-right"`、`"from-top"`、`"from-bottom"`

entries.en-US: ## Timing Options
entries.zh-Hans: ## 时序选项

entries.en-US: ## Duration calculation
entries.zh-Hans: ## 持续时间计算

entries.en-US: Transitions overlap adjacent scenes, so the total composition length is **shorter** than the sum of all sequence durations.
entries.zh-Hans: 过渡会与相邻场景重叠，因此合成总长度**短于**所有序列持续时间之和。

entries.en-US: For example, with two 60-frame sequences and a 15-frame transition:
entries.zh-Hans: 例如，有两个 60 帧的序列和一个 15 帧的过渡：

entries.en-US:
- Without transitions: `60 + 60 = 120` frames
- With transition: `60 + 60 - 15 = 105` frames
The transition duration is subtracted because both scenes play simultaneously during the transition.
entries.zh-Hans: 持续时间被减去是因为在过渡期间两个场景同时播放。

entries.en-US: ### Getting the duration of a transition
entries.zh-Hans: ### 获取过渡的持续时间

entries.en-US: Use the `getDurationInFrames()` method on the timing object:
entries.zh-Hans: 在时序对象上使用 `getDurationInFrames()` 方法：

entries.en-US: For `springTiming` without an explicit `durationInFrames`, the duration depends on `fps` because it calculates when the spring animation settles.
entries.zh-Hans: 对于没有显式指定 `durationInFrames` 的 `springTiming`，其持续时间取决于 `fps`，因为它计算的是弹簧动画何时稳定。

entries.en-US: ### Calculating total composition duration
entries.zh-Hans: ### 计算合成总持续时间
